channel.title: What Is Being Built — Daily Activity Feed
channel.description: Daily updates on open-source automated research tools: commits, releases, and community activity.

item.title: Daily digest — 2026-07-18
item.description:
Our community has seen significant activity across multiple projects, with notable updates and connections between them. The statcheck project, led by MicheleNuijten, has integrated changes from its remote repository, while the tenzing project has updated its site and documentation, including recommendations and writing improvements. Meanwhile, the ontogenerator in the oddpub project has been refined with a new version, updated documentation, and a Zenodo badge. These efforts demonstrate the community's commitment to enhancing research tools, such as docpluck, which has addressed issues with text loss and glyph recovery, and regcheck, which has fixed bugs and improved its demo page. Additionally, the escicheck project has been synchronized with the escicheckapp repository, ensuring consistency and alignment with the latest developments. Overall, these updates highlight the collaborative spirit and dedication to advancing open-source research tools within our community.

36 commits across 4 active repositories this week.

New releases: oddpub v7.3.0

Dormant repos revived: statcheck, tenzing

Most active:

regcheck18 commits
oddpub9 commits
metacheck7 commits
tenzing2 commits

item.title: metacheck: 4 commits today
item.description:
scienceverse/metacheck

The `dev` branch was the focus of recent work, with multiple merge requests incorporated. The `jw_plumber_bibr_api` branch was merged, as described in pull request #333. The `jw_bibr_read_passthrough` branch was also merged, as outlined in pull request #332. Additionally, the `jw_grobid_text_fix` branch was merged, addressing a specific text fix, as noted in pull request #331. The `jw_schema_sync_10_5` branch was merged as well, related to schema synchronization, as seen in pull request #330.

4 commit(s) today:

  • 1c49ec7 [dev] Merge pull request #333 from scienceverse/jw_plumber_bibr_api — Lisa DeBruine
  • f9da25f [dev] Merge pull request #332 from scienceverse/jw_bibr_read_passthrough — Lisa DeBruine
  • 0736a45 [dev] Merge pull request #331 from scienceverse/jw_grobid_text_fix — Lisa DeBruine
  • 9c2d675 [dev] Merge pull request #330 from scienceverse/jw_schema_sync_10_5 — Lisa DeBruine
  • 0a34c42 [data_check] process jasp files, better study categorization, better scale extraction. — Lakens
  • a4b8270 [data_check] additions — Lakens
  • 69afca1 [data_check] The OpenScales OSD export now exists end-to-end. Work spanned three files: — Lakens
  • c799dcf [data_check] improve cache, keep original data, better hardcoded folders — Lakens
  • 0c8303d [data_check] fix bugs, add archive report, gate large github repos, improve feedback — Lakens
  • 2615ab2 [data_check] updates osf download — Lakens
  • 58122ed [data_check] updates to functions, fix bugs — Lakens
  • ad4cb14 [data_check] improvements — Lakens
  • a73d52a [jw_llm_fixes] fix(llm): correct ollama-native gate (&& not %%); fail-fast param/model checks — Jakub Werner
  • d99956e [dev] feat(plumber): bibr-JSON REST API — validated uploads, HTML report, hardened runtime — Jakub Werner
  • 4daee8c [dev] feat(read): let bibr abstract and figure/table captions flow through — Jakub Werner
  • 00d98b8 [dev] fix(grobid): stop anchor normalization from corrupting paper text — Jakub Werner
  • 4d53313 [dev] fix(schema): sync bundled paper.json to bibr v10.5 — Jakub Werner
  • fdc5a1d [jw_fable_fixes] tests: fix test_that wrapper warnings, add expect_disjoint, env-aware .onLoad test — Jakub Werner
  • 994fb58 [jw_fable_fixes] modules: fix code_check green path, ref_miscitation report, traffic lights, stale imports — Jakub Werner
  • de6fd04 [jw_fable_fixes] core: fix GROBID text corruption, LLM crashes, API hardening — Jakub Werner

View all commits →

item.title: statcheck: activity update
item.description:
MicheleNuijten/statcheck

The `feature-non-apa-newer` branch was worked on, where a merge was performed from the same branch of the `https://github.com/MicheleNuijten/statcheck` repository. The merge commit was made to integrate changes from the remote repository into the local `feature-non-apa-newer` branch. Additionally, on the `feature-non-apa-newer` branch, "admin updates" were made, as per the commit message. No other branches were modified in this set of commits. The work was done by MicheleNuijten.

⚠ This repository was dormant and has recently become active again.

View all commits →

item.title: tenzing: 2 commits today
item.description:
marton-balazs-kovacs/tenzing

The `gh-pages` branch was updated with a commit that built the site for `tenzing@0.4.1`, as indicated by the commit message "Anka: Built site for tenzing@0.4.1: 388e7e3". The `master` branch was updated with a commit by Alex O. Holcombe that updated the `about.Rmd` file, specifically to include recommendations and improve the writing. No other branches were worked on in these commits, which only include changes to `gh-pages` and `master`. The changes to `about.Rmd` on the `master` branch aimed to enhance the content by adding recommendations and refining the writing style. No new features or modules were added in these commits, only the aforementioned updates to the site and documentation.

2 commit(s) today:

  • 0e4950f [gh-pages] Built site for tenzing@0.4.1: 388e7e3 — Anka
  • 388e7e3 [master] Update about.Rmd with recommendations, improve writing — Alex O. Holcombe

⚠ This repository was dormant and has recently become active again.

View all commits →

item.title: oddpub: 5 commits today
item.description:
quest-bih/oddpub

The `main` branch was the focus of the recent work, where the ontogenerator's Zenodo badge was updated. The README file also underwent a "touchup", as described in the commit message. Additionally, the version number of the ontogenerator was incremented to 7.3.0. The Zenodo badge was also added in a separate commit, with another commit message simply stating "zenodo badge". Furthermore, the documentation was updated and keyword cleanup was performed, as part of the efforts to refine the ontogenerator.

5 commit(s) today:

  • e1ca58e [main] Updated Zenodo badge — ontogenerator
  • 441d354 [main] README touchup — ontogenerator
  • 998a877 [main] Increment version number to 7.3.0 — ontogenerator
  • 95643d5 [main] zenodo badge — ontogenerator
  • 7c98de1 [main] Documentation update, keyword cleanup — ontogenerator
  • febed59 [main] documentation update — ontogenerator
  • 2b600f3 [main] improved reuse and upon request, references detection — ontogenerator
  • 52e8aeb [main] no_new_code statements — ontogenerator
  • f2850fe [main] debugging open data detection db 2023-2024 — ontogenerator

View all commits →
